title: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Constant Contact. Learn pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and Constant Contact serve different segments of the email marketing market. Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators seeking monetization and growth tools, while Constant Contact caters to small businesses and nonprofits needing comprehensive marketing features. Your choice depends on whether you're publishing content or running a broader marketing operation.

comparison_table.tool_a: Monetization, ad network, referral program, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, SMS, social ads, e-commerce

choose_a_if: You're starting a newsletter and want a free option with room to grow
Monetizing your content through ads or subscriptions is a priority
You value strong customer satisfaction scores and modern features
choose_b_if: You need SMS marketing, event management, or social media ad integration
E-commerce functionality is essential for your business
You prefer established tools with 25+ years of market presence

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators with better pricing, growth features, and higher customer satisfaction scores. Constant Contact is superior for small businesses needing broader marketing tools like SMS, events, and e-commerce integration. Neither is universally 'better'—they target different audiences.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Beehiiv is more affordable, offering a free tier for up to 2,500 subscribers with paid plans starting at $39/month. Constant Contact charges $12/month with no free option. For growing publishers, Beehiiv's free plan provides significant value before you need to pay.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber lists from Constant Contact to Beehiiv. Both platforms support CSV imports and standard email list formats. However, you may lose some advanced Constant Contact features like SMS or event management since Beehiiv focuses specifically on email newsletters.
